reason: All 6 test steps executed successfully with agent responding correctly to math question.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents including target agent "QA-20260318-230911-3g0v" with "idle" status
Clicked "QA-20260318-230911-3g0v" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened showing "Start a conversation with QA-20260318-230911-3g0v" with message input field
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status badge confirmed as "idle" in the agent header
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and sent button clicked, agent status changed to "working" and new session "Basic Math Question Session" created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response arrived within 2 seconds, agent status returned to "idle"
Verified response mentions "4" — Screenshot confirms agent response displays "4." in chat message list
